description: As 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' (password: 'ArkCase1234!'), create a 'Response Letter' (or Letter) correspondence for FOIA case 'FOIA-Correspondence-Test-2025'. Use the subject 'Official Response - Records Request Determination' and the body text: 'Dear Requester, after careful review of your Freedom of Information Act request dated May 15, 2025, we have determined that the requested records are releasable in full. Please find the enclosed documents responsive to your request. If you have questions regarding this determination, you may contact our FOIA office. Sincerely, FOIA Processing Team.' Save the correspondence to the case record.
